title: Negotiator
overview: Yuugo, a hostage negotiator from Japan, is enlisted by a young woman named Mayuko Iwase whose father has been taken hostage by a warlord in Pakistan.  The previous negotiator, hired by her father's employer, was killed when negotiations broke down due to military intervention.

title: Decision
overview: Yuugo continues preparations in Pakistan.  Before his departure, he was given a lead on a an Sheik who may be willing to assist him in making contact with the warlord holding Mayuko's father.  Following a chance encounter, Yuugo frees a young woman being kept as a slave by a band of travellers.

title: Contact
overview: Yuugo updates Mayuko on his progress by radio.  The military intercept the transmission and take an interest in the expedition.  Taking refuge in a cave from a searching helicopter, Yuugo and the young woman who is now following him are discovered by a Daku patrol.

title: Warrior
overview: Yuugo has been sentenced to death by the Daku.  They tie him to a stone and leave him to his fate in the noon sun.  Knowing that Yusuf Ali is watching, Yuugo resolves to demonstrate to Ali that he is a warrior with whom he should negotiate.

title: Trust
overview: Having gained the trust of Yusuf Ali, Yuugo must now contact Mayuko once again to arrange the randsom funds.  Knowing that a further radio transmission will draw the military to the Daku camp, he persuades Ali that the camp must be evacuated.
